title: Self Stirring Mug, VEREMUND Rechargeable Self Stirring Coffee Mug, Glass Electric High Speed Mixing Cup, 400ML USB Charging Auto Mixing Cup to Stir Coffee/Milk/Protein Powder at Desk
description:
2024 New Self Stirring Mug - The Electric Mixing Cup is 2024 NEW version, USB rechargeable, has long lasting battery life. It can evenly and quickly mix coffee, milk, tea, protein powder and other powdered drinks. Note: Viscous beverages are not applicable.
Glass Novelty Stirring Cup - Electric high speed mixing cup is made of food grade high borosilicate glass, which can withstand high and low temperature changes, glass material is safer, no BPA. Lid imitates the color of wood and is made of safe plastic.
Rechargeable High-speed Stirring Cup - This self mixing cup with lid and rotor, suitable for office and home use. The rotor can be removed during the cleaning, when you are not using rotor, it can be placed in the handle.
Easy to Use & Clean - The whole automatic stirring cup can be washed under water. Before washing, MUST close tightly the protective silicone cover of the USB charging port. ATTENTION - It is not suggested to soak them in water.
Package Included - You will get one box with 1 x glass mixing cup with lid, 1 x USB charging cable. The Glass cup is rechargeable with Type-C port. Stirring cup capacity: 400ml, mug size: 3.7in * 3.7in * 4.1in.
reviews_5s: I don't like that it's glass for I'm clumsy but it has definitely made it easier to whip small items!
reviews_1s: Less than 6 months no longer works. Don’t waste your money
